creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Takeshi,

I'm trying to find out what the state of this is. Were you able to resolve
the problem you described in your report [1], or do you still think there
is a problem with the port itself? Please let us know if this PR can be
closed.

Regards,
Stefan

[1]: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/127530
